overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk from a dark, graffiti-covered area under a massive highway overpass into the bright neon-lit streets of Night City. The camera emerges from shadow into sunlight, passing futuristic vehicles and digital billboards before reaching an open waterfront promenade lined with red-leaved trees and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: camera begins walking forward along the wall, moving away from the billboard
approaching the exit where bright sunlight becomes visible at the end of the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the graffiti-covered concrete wall under the dark overpass, moving away from the digital billboard

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard with pink neon text 'FEEL THE CHEMS' and image of a woman
massive concrete bridge structure overhead with metal support beams
concrete wall covered in blue and yellow graffiti tags and street art
orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, enclosed space under a massive highway overpass. A bright pink digital billboard advertising 'FEEL THE CHEMS' dominates the left side initially, while graffiti covers the concrete walls. The camera walks forward along the narrow walkway, moving deeper under the bridge where the sky is completely obscured.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area at overpass exit with multi-lane road intersection

events.description: exits the covered overpass into open urban area with direct sunlight
futuristic black sedan passes by on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk, emerging from the shadow of the overpass into bright sunlight while approaching the street

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket standing near the wall under the overpass
futuristic black sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and industrial structures visible in the distance against the bright sky
trees with distinctive bright red foliage lining the street ahead
elevated concrete highway ramp with support pillars extending into the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark overpass into bright morning sunlight, revealing a futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers in the distance. The transition from shadow to light is dramatic as vehicles begin to appear on the multi-lane road. A person in blue stands near the wall under the remaining overpass structure while red-leaved trees become visible further down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with industrial district backdrop

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the underside of the overpass structure
camera looks directly up at bright sky causing lens flare and glare

agents.ego_description: walking along the street while looking up at the digital billboards mounted on the underside of the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving past on the road below the overpass

entered.detail: multiple digital advertising screens mounted on the underside of the highway bridge showing colorful animations
factory chimneys emitting white smoke plumes in the industrial district background
black metal safety fence along the sidewalk edge separating pedestrian from vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: Now fully outside the overpass shadow, the camera moves along the open street with a clear view of the industrial skyline. The camera tilts upward to reveal digital billboards mounted on the underside of the highway structure above, displaying bright advertisements against the blue sky. A yellow taxi passes by on the road while industrial smokestacks are visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with red bike lane and neon-lit commercial towers

events.description: moving from under overpass shadow fully into open waterfront promenade area
approaching the waterfront with view of the bay and industrial harbor structures

agents.ego_description: walking along the distinctive red bike lane on the waterfront promenade, observing the futuristic neon-lit cityscape and waterfront views

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: tall futuristic commercial towers with bright neon signs and holographic advertisements
body of water with industrial harbor structures and docks on the opposite shore
distinctive bright red paved lane for bicycles running along the center of the promenade
tall modern street light pole with curved design

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a bright, open waterfront promenade with a distinctive red bike lane running along the path. Towering neon-lit skyscrapers rise on the left displaying bright advertisements, while the waterfront bay stretches out to the right with industrial harbor structures visible across the water. Red-leaved trees line the promenade, and the camera moves steadily forward through this vibrant cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, shadowed underpass into the expansive, sun-drenched streets of a futuristic metropolis. It begins in a dark, enclosed space beneath a massive highway overpass, where graffiti-covered concrete walls and a glowing pink digital billboard advertising 'FEEL THE CHEMS' dominate the narrow walkway. As the camera pushes forward deeper into the gloom, the oppressive ceiling of the bridge eventually gives way to a dramatic burst of morning sunlight. The scene then opens into a bright cityscape, shifting from the dimness of the overpass to a wide view of towering skyscrapers and multi-lane roads filled with vehicles. Finally, the camera passes a figure in blue standing by the remaining concrete structure as the view expands toward a street lined with vibrant red-leaved trees.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the industrial shadows of a highway overpass into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of a waterfront promenade. It begins by moving along an open street under a blue sky, where the camera tilts upward to reveal bright digital advertisements mounted to the underside of the highway structure. As a yellow taxi passes by, the view expands to show distant industrial smokestacks before the path shifts toward the coast. The scene then opens onto a bright promenade featuring a distinctive red bike lane and red-leaved trees, with towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards rising on the left. Finally, the camera moves steadily forward, contrasting the urban density of the city with the open bay and industrial harbor structures stretching across the water to the right.
